title: Show Interface Status
description: Displays status, protocol state, and statistics for interfaces.
sample_output: GigabitEthernet0/1 is up, line protocol is up

title: Show Interface Brief
description: Shows a summarized one-line-per-interface status table.
sample_output: Interface   IP-Address   OK? Method Status  Protocol

title: Configure Interface Description
description: Sets a text description on an interface for documentation purposes.

title: Shutdown / No Shutdown Interface
description: Administratively disables or enables an interface.
notes: Interface goes admin-down when shutdown is applied.

title: Show Interface Counters
description: Shows packet/error counters per interface.

title: Show IP Route Table
description: Displays the IPv4 routing table.
sample_output: Gateway of last resort is 192.168.1.1 to network 0.0.0.0

title: Show IPv6 Route Table
description: Displays the IPv6 routing table.

title: Configure Static Route
description: Configures an IPv4 static route.
notes: IOS-XR uses a router static configuration submode.

title: Show BGP Summary
description: Displays BGP neighbor session states and prefix counts.
sample_output: Neighbor  V  AS  MsgRcvd  MsgSent  ...  State/PfxRcd

title: Show BGP Neighbors
description: Displays detailed BGP neighbor state, capabilities, and counters.
sample_output: BGP neighbor is 192.168.1.2, remote AS 65002, external link

title: Show BGP Table
description: Displays the BGP routing table (Adj-RIB / local RIB).
sample_output: Network        Next Hop      Metric LocPrf Weight Path

title: Configure BGP Neighbor
description: Configures a BGP neighbor and remote AS.

title: Clear BGP Session
description: Resets a BGP session (soft or hard).
notes: Hard clear tears down the TCP session; soft clear does not.

title: Show OSPF Neighbors
description: Displays OSPF neighbor adjacency states.
sample_output: Neighbor ID     Pri   State           Dead Time   Address

title: Show OSPF Database
description: Displays the OSPF link-state database (LSDB).

title: Enable OSPF on Interface
description: Enables OSPF routing process and advertises a network.
nx_os: feature ospf / router ospf <tag> / interface <if> / ip router ospf <tag> area <area>
notes: NX-OS requires 'feature ospf' first and uses interface-level enabling.

title: Show OSPF Interface
description: Shows OSPF-enabled interfaces, area, cost, and timers.
sample_output: GigabitEthernet0/1 is up, line protocol is up

title: Show ISIS Neighbors
description: Displays IS-IS adjacency states.
sample_output: System Id  Type Interface  IP Address  State  Holdtime  Circuit Id
notes: Classic IOS uses 'show clns neighbors'; IOS-XE/XR use 'show isis neighbors'.

title: Show ISIS Database
description: Displays the IS-IS link-state database.

title: Show MPLS Forwarding Table
description: Displays the MPLS label forwarding information base (LFIB).
sample_output: Local  Outgoing    Prefix            Bytes Label   Outgoing   Next Hop

title: Show MPLS Interfaces
description: Shows interfaces enabled for MPLS label switching.
sample_output: Interface              IP            Tunnel   BGP Static Operational

title: Show LDP Neighbors
description: Displays LDP peer sessions.
sample_output: Peer LDP Ident: 2.2.2.2:0; Local LDP Ident 1.1.1.1:0

title: Show LDP Bindings
description: Displays the LDP label information base.

title: Show RSVP Interfaces
description: Displays RSVP-enabled interfaces and reserved bandwidth for TE tunnels.
sample_output: interface       allocated   i/f max   flow max  sub max

title: Show RSVP Sessions
description: Shows active RSVP-TE sessions and their reserved paths.

title: Show Segment Routing Prefix-SIDs
description: Displays configured Segment Routing prefix-SID mappings.
notes: Not supported on classic IOS; requires IOS-XE/XR/NX-OS with SR-MPLS enabled.

title: Show IS-IS Segment Routing
description: Displays IS-IS segment routing adjacency-SID and prefix-SID advertisements.
sample_output: Prefix        SRGB Base  SID Index  Label

title: Show EVPN Instances
description: Displays configured EVPN instances and their route distinguishers.
notes: Not supported on classic IOS.

title: Show EVPN MAC Routes
description: Displays learned MAC addresses distributed via EVPN Type-2 routes.
sample_output: MAC Address    EVI   Ethernet Segment  Next Hop

title: Show VXLAN VTEP Peers
description: Displays VXLAN Network Virtualization Edge (VTEP) peer status.
notes: IOS-XR uses 'show vxlan vtep-detail'; NX-OS/IOS-XE use 'show nve peers'.

title: Show VXLAN VNI
description: Displays configured VXLAN Network Identifiers (VNIs) and their state.
sample_output: Codes: CP - Control Plane   DP - Data Plane

title: Show QoS Policy Map
description: Displays applied QoS policy-maps and interface statistics.

title: Configure Class Map
description: Defines traffic classification criteria used by a policy-map.

title: Show Access Lists
description: Displays configured access control lists and match counters.

title: Configure Extended ACL
description: Creates a named or numbered extended access control list.
example: ip access-list extended BLOCK-TELNET\n deny tcp any any eq 23

title: Show NAT Translations
description: Displays active NAT translation table entries.
sample_output: Pro Inside global   Inside local    Outside local   Outside global

title: Configure NAT Overload (PAT)
description: Configures dynamic NAT with port address translation (overload).
ios: ip nat inside source list <acl> interface <if> overload
ios_xe: ip nat inside source list <acl> interface <if> overload
nx_os: ip nat source list <acl> interface <if> overload
syntax: ip nat inside source list 1 interface Gi0/0 overload
example: ip nat inside source list 1 interface Gi0/0 overload
notes: IOS-XR NAT configuration syntax differs significantly (NAT64/NAT44 submode).

title: Show VRF
description: Displays configured VRF instances and their route-distinguishers.

title: Configure VRF
description: Creates a VRF and assigns it to an interface.
notes: Classic IOS uses 'ip vrf'; newer platforms use 'vrf definition' or 'vrf context'.

title: Enable AAA New-Model
description: Enables the AAA (Authentication, Authorization, Accounting) subsystem.
notes: IOS-XR AAA is active by default; NX-OS requires 'feature aaa' where applicable.

title: Show AAA Sessions
description: Displays currently active AAA authenticated sessions.

title: Configure RADIUS Server
description: Configures a RADIUS server for authentication.
syntax: radius server RAD1\n address ipv4 10.0.0.5\n key cisco123
example: radius server RAD1\n address ipv4 10.0.0.5\n key cisco123

title: Show RADIUS Statistics
description: Displays RADIUS server communication statistics.

title: Configure TACACS+ Server
description: Configures a TACACS+ server used for AAA.
syntax: tacacs server TAC1\n address ipv4 10.0.0.6\n key cisco123
example: tacacs server TAC1\n address ipv4 10.0.0.6\n key cisco123

title: Show TACACS Status
description: Displays TACACS+ server reachability and statistics.

title: Show HSRP Status
description: Displays HSRP (Hot Standby Router Protocol) group state.
sample_output: Interface   Grp  Pri P State   Active          Standby         Virtual IP
notes: IOS-XR/NX-OS use 'show hsrp'.

title: Configure HSRP
description: Configures an HSRP group with a virtual IP address.
ios_xr: router hsrp / interface <if> / address-family ipv4 / hsrp <group>

title: Show VRRP Status
description: Displays VRRP (Virtual Router Redundancy Protocol) group state.
sample_output: Interface  Grp Pri Time  Own Pre State   Master addr

title: Configure VRRP
description: Configures a VRRP group with a virtual IP address.
ios_xr: router vrrp / interface <if> / address-family ipv4 / vrrp <group>

title: Show GLBP Status
description: Displays GLBP (Gateway Load Balancing Protocol) group state.
sample_output: Interface   Grp  Fwd Pri State    Address
notes: GLBP is a Cisco proprietary protocol primarily supported on IOS/IOS-XE.

title: Show PIM Neighbors
description: Displays PIM neighbor adjacencies.
sample_output: Neighbor Address  Interface  Uptime/Expires  Ver  DR

title: Show PIM RP Mapping
description: Displays the Rendezvous Point (RP) mapping for PIM sparse mode.

title: Show IGMP Groups
description: Displays IGMP multicast group membership learned on interfaces.

title: Show SNMP Status
description: Displays SNMP agent statistics and configured communities.

title: Configure SNMP Community
description: Configures an SNMP read-only or read-write community string.
notes: Plain-text community strings are considered insecure; prefer SNMPv3.

title: Show NetFlow Statistics
description: Displays NetFlow flow cache statistics.
notes: Command syntax evolved significantly from legacy NetFlow (IOS) to Flexible NetFlow (IOS-XE).

title: Configure Flow Exporter
example: flow exporter EXP1\n destination 10.0.0.10\n transport udp 2055
notes: Not available on classic IOS (uses 'ip flow-export' instead).

title: Show Telemetry Sessions
description: Displays active model-driven telemetry (MDT) subscriptions.
notes: Not supported on classic IOS.

title: Show Logging Buffer
description: Displays the contents of the local logging buffer.

title: Configure Syslog Server
description: Configures a remote syslog server to receive log messages.

title: Debug IP Packet
description: Enables debugging of IP packets processed by the router (CPU-intensive).
notes: Use with caution in production; can overwhelm the CPU. Always pair with an ACL filter.

title: Undebug All
description: Disables all active debug output.
sample_output: All possible debugging has been turned off

title: Show Users / Sessions
description: Displays active login sessions on the device.

title: Enable Secret Password
description: Sets an encrypted enable-mode password.
notes: IOS-XR does not use a global enable secret; access is controlled via AAA/task groups.

title: Show MAC Address Table
description: Displays the switch's learned MAC address to port mappings.
notes: IOS-XR command applies to L2VPN/EVPN contexts since IOS-XR is primarily used on routers.

title: Show Spanning Tree
description: Displays Spanning Tree Protocol topology and port roles/states.
sample_output: VLAN0010\n  Spanning tree enabled protocol ieee

title: Configure STP Root Priority
description: Sets the bridge priority to influence root bridge election.
notes: Priority must be a multiple of 4096. Not applicable on IOS-XR (no native L2 STP).

title: Enable Rapid-PVST
description: Enables Rapid Per-VLAN Spanning Tree (802.1w) mode.

title: Configure MST Region
description: Configures the Multiple Spanning Tree (MST) region name and revision.
example: spanning-tree mst configuration\n name REGION1\n revision 1
notes: Not natively applicable to IOS-XR (routing-focused OS).

title: Show VLANs
description: Displays configured VLANs and their assigned ports.
notes: Not applicable to IOS-XR routers.

title: Create VLAN
description: Creates a VLAN and assigns it a name.

title: Show EtherChannel Summary
description: Displays EtherChannel port-channel groups and member port status.
notes: IOS-XR/NX-OS terminology refers to it as a 'bundle' or 'port-channel' respectively.

title: Configure LACP Port-Channel
description: Adds an interface to a LACP-negotiated EtherChannel.
notes: 'active' initiates LACP negotiation; 'passive' waits for the peer to initiate.

title: Show UDLD Status
description: Displays UniDirectional Link Detection status per interface.
sample_output: Interface Gi0/1\n Port enable administrative configuration setting: Enabled
notes: Not applicable to IOS-XR.

title: Show CDP Neighbors
description: Displays directly connected Cisco devices discovered via CDP.
sample_output: Device ID        Local Intrfce     Holdtme    Capability

title: Show LLDP Neighbors
description: Displays neighbors discovered via the vendor-neutral LLDP protocol.
sample_output: Device ID    Local Intf    Hold-time  Capability   Port ID

title: Show ARP Table
description: Displays the IPv4 Address Resolution Protocol (ARP) cache.
sample_output: Protocol  Address    Age (min)  Hardware Addr   Type   Interface
notes: IOS-XR uses 'show arp' (no 'ip' keyword).

title: Ping (IPv4 Connectivity Test)
description: Sends ICMP echo requests to test IPv4 reachability.

title: Traceroute
description: Traces the Layer 3 hop-by-hop path to a destination.

title: Configure IPv4 Address on Interface
description: Assigns an IPv4 address and subnet mask to an interface.

title: Show IPv6 Neighbors
description: Displays the IPv6 neighbor discovery cache (equivalent to ARP for IPv6).
sample_output: IPv6 Address                Age Link-layer Addr State Interface

title: Configure IPv6 Address
description: Assigns an IPv6 address to an interface.

title: Show DHCP Bindings
description: Displays active DHCP lease bindings on a DHCP server.
sample_output: IP address    Client-ID/Hardware address    Lease expiration    Type

title: Configure DHCP Pool
description: Creates a DHCP address pool for a local DHCP server.
notes: NX-OS primarily supports DHCP relay rather than a full local DHCP server feature set.

title: Configure DNS Server
description: Configures the DNS server(s) used for name resolution.

title: Show NTP Status
description: Displays NTP synchronization status and clock stratum.

title: Configure NTP Server
description: Configures an NTP time source for clock synchronization.

title: Set Logging Severity Level
description: Sets the minimum severity level of messages sent to the logging buffer/syslog.
notes: Severity levels 0 (emergency) through 7 (debugging), lower number = higher severity.

title: Show IP SLA Statistics
description: Displays results of configured IP SLA probes (latency, jitter, loss).

title: Configure IP SLA ICMP Echo
description: Creates an IP SLA operation that measures ICMP echo round-trip time.

title: Show Route-Map
description: Displays configured route-maps used for PBR or redistribution.
notes: IOS-XR uses 'route-policy' (RPL) syntax instead of classic route-maps.

title: Apply Policy-Based Routing to Interface
description: Applies a route-map for policy-based routing on an interface.
example: interface Gi0/1\n ip policy route-map PBR-MAP

title: Show IP Multicast Routing Table
description: Displays the IP multicast routing table (mroute).

title: Enable IP Multicast Routing
description: Globally enables IP multicast routing on the device.
notes: NX-OS requires 'feature pim' rather than a direct 'ip multicast-routing' command.

title: Show Running Configuration
description: Displays the currently active configuration in RAM.

title: Save Configuration
description: Saves the running configuration to NVRAM/startup-config.
notes: IOS-XR requires an explicit 'commit' to activate staged configuration changes.

title: Show Version
description: Displays hardware, software version, and uptime information.

title: Reload Device
description: Reboots the device.
notes: Always save configuration before reloading.

title: Show CPU and Memory Usage
description: Displays CPU utilization and per-process load.

title: Configure Telnet/SSH VTY Access
description: Configures remote access (Telnet/SSH) parameters on VTY lines.
syntax: line vty 0 4\n transport input ssh\n login local
example: line vty 0 4\n transport input ssh\n login local
notes: Restricting transport input to ssh disables Telnet for better security.

title: Show Interface Transceiver / Optics
description: Displays optical transceiver diagnostics (DOM) such as Tx/Rx power.
sample_output: Temperature   Voltage   Tx Bias  Tx Power  Rx Power

title: Show Port-Channel Load Balance
description: Displays or configures the hashing algorithm for load-balancing across bundle members.

title: Show VLAN Trunk Status
description: Displays interfaces configured as 802.1Q trunk ports and allowed VLANs.
sample_output: Port      Mode   Encapsulation   Status  Native vlan
notes: Not applicable to IOS-XR.

title: Show OSPF Database Summary
description: Provides a count summary of LSA types in the OSPF database.

title: Show BGP Regexp / AS-Path Filter
description: Filters BGP table entries by AS-path regular expression.
sample_output: Network        Next Hop      Metric LocPrf Weight Path

title: Show Interface Load Statistics
description: Displays traffic load statistics (packets/bytes switched) per interface.
sample_output: Switching path    Pkts In   Chars In   Pkts Out   Chars Out

title: Show Access-List Hit Counters
description: Displays per-entry match counters for an access-list.
sample_output: 10 deny tcp any any eq telnet (34 matches)

title: Show CEF Table
description: Displays the Cisco Express Forwarding (CEF) FIB table.

title: Show Interface QoS Queueing
description: Displays queueing statistics for an interface's egress queues.

title: Show Interface Rate Limiting / Policing
description: Displays policer statistics (conformed/exceeded/violated traffic) applied to an interface.

title: Show Environment (Power/Fan/Temp)
description: Displays hardware environmental status: power supplies, fans, and temperature sensors.

title: Show Inventory
description: Displays hardware module and serial number inventory.

title: Show IP OSPF Border Routers
description: Displays ABR and ASBR routes known to the OSPF process.

title: Show BGP VPNv4 Table
description: Displays MPLS L3VPN (VPNv4) BGP routes across all VRFs.

title: Show Segment Routing SRv6 Locators
description: Displays configured SRv6 locators and their associated SIDs.
notes: Not supported on classic IOS.

title: Show EVPN Ethernet Segment
description: Displays multihoming Ethernet Segment Identifiers (ESI) for EVPN.

title: Show VXLAN Flood-List
description: Displays the BUM (broadcast/unknown-unicast/multicast) flood replication list per VNI.
